channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: WFH CHADS REPORT IN — 94 replies — 157.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
WFH CHADS REPORT IN

Open thread • Replies: 94 • Updated: 2026-03-12 13:14 UTC

OP

Let's all laugh at the wagies who have to pay insane amounts for gas to get to work kek

Early replies (first 3)

61953886
>>61953855
Imagine spending half your days pay worth of money just to get to work and back lmao

61954053
>>61953855
antisemitic wfh antizog antimiga chads will inherit the earth

61954077
>>61953886
>half
You mean full for minimum wage chads, don’t forget about rent and bills too.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61962422
>>61959577
The main purpose of female employment is to prevent them from having babies.

61963454
Has anyone here got a WFH in 2025/6? Most seem to be hybrid with full office required during probation

61963700
>>61963454
Yea I snagged a WFH bank job doing cybersecurity end of 2025. Technically we all work at the office but managers tell their teams where to work and my boomer manager is lazy and won't go to the office basically ever so neither does anyone else on his team.

61963769
Anyone else ride an e-bike?

61964574
I have been WFH for two years. For a long time I was playing tons of video games and working maybe 5 hours per week, kek. Now there's a lot more work to do though, but I still only work maybe 20 hours per week on average. The first half of every day I dedicate to reading news, drinking coffee and shitting. I actually feel bad about it as I want to do meaningful work but since we live in clown world I don't care. I was actually the highest performer by far in previous shit jobs like callcenters.

61965044
>>61954585
Came here to post this.

61965065
>>61954976
I just hired someone (WFH) from LinkedIn, I made a post asking for particular skills and he saw it and had a job the next week.
All social media is cancer but LinkedIn does improve work prospects unfortunately.

61965110
>>61964574
I've been WFH for seven years now, a non-coding job watching over a SAAS application. Most days I just fuck around but for example this week I have lots of work. So I fucked around all morning, did nothing during work hours, but now I am bored so I am gonna put in around 4 hours of real work until I feel sleepy. That's probably going to carry me for a couple days.

The flexibility is great its basically like being a full paid NEET if you have a minimum of willpower to actually strategically do work when absolutely needed. I actually get great ratings and raises every year

61965143
WFH healthcare Epic guy here. Have an offer to consult for big bucks, but it will require I leave my home periodically to travel. What do?

61965186
>>61965143
dinners with american boomers is the absolutely most painful part of my WFH job but it hasn't happened in over a year now. I'd say its worth it

61965203
>>61965186
Leaving a full time position for a short contract for the first time scares me, but when you're good (I am) the work keeps coming. Think im going for it.

61965295
Neet reporting in!
0 work per week!

61965410
>>61965110
Very comfy and based anon.

61965438
>>61958532
Are you me, lmao. I scroll through a lot of maps when I'm bored.

61965873
>>61954356
Holy comfy wtf
How much do you get paid and what's your job?

61965895
>>61958588
>>61959006
Kino, I have a mild secret sex fetish

61966734
>>61953855
>Let's all laugh at the wagies who..
Silly wagie, don't act like you're better than the rest of the cucks. If you're a wagie in any shape or form you are a lesser lifeform compared by default, to the NEET elite. Wagens truly say the darndest things.

61966978
>>61965203
Contract came in, no travel after all

61967069
>>61953855
Anyone else have a low 6 figure wfh job but hate it? Been at my place 4 years and worked my way up. Have a 2 year old and expecting another one. Not leaving it anytime soon but it’s starting to drain my soul. It’s comfy but has busy seasons and they blow. Anyone else feeling the golden cuffs?>>61953855

61967221
>>61959314
>Be careful
>When you are literally fulfilling your genetic perogative
No thanks, i will impregnate my wife on the clock as much as possible.

61967504
I work 2 jobs, one is full remote, but the other is 4 days in office, one from home. I've been actively looking to replace that one with a second full remote job.

61968042
>>61965895
>having penis in vagina sex with your wife is fetish material
Do zoomies really?

61968154
>>61954162
i just do the this when i'm not in the mood for work

61969091
>>61968042
It is if you're doing it in secret while on a call. Fetishes aren't always physical. I admit the lunch break one really isn't.

61969156
>>61969091
Just a variant of exhibitionism which, yes, I am into. Nothing like sex outdoors where you can get caught.

61969187
>>61969156
>exhibitionism
Fuck this is what I was trying to think of. Thanks

61969207
Goddamit I'm looking for a full WFM job, but it's really difficult these days, in my country the standard is 3 days in the office.

61969766
>>61968154
I guess your company must have non-existent monitoring software.

61970946
I checked and I was in office 25 times in 2025. The job is officially billed as hybrid, expecting to be in office 1-2 times per week. But everyone up to the sr director is constantly looking for ways to not come in lol

61973360
Another great thing about WFH is the ability to monitor world news, the stock market and make trades, earning even more money during paid hours.

item.title: IRAN SAYS OIL TO $200 soon — 29 replies — 116.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
IRAN SAYS OIL TO $200 soon

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-12 13:38 UTC

OP

AHHHHHHHH

Early replies (first 3)

61968508
Iran who?

61968512
>>61968491

Based Iran about to pump my bags

61968516
>>61968508
Iran out of oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968519
Robinhood won’t let me buy oil futures because I can’t answer the stupid questions correctly

61968536
>>61968519
You got IQ filtered lol
And not for the questions, for using Robinhood

61968538
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

61968573
>>61968519
Have you tried being less retarded?

61968578
>>61968491
And what dies this do for my shipping stocks FOR said oil?

×100 at least?

61968590
>>61968538
They went from creating national problems to global catastrophes. It’s all astounding.

61968620
>somebody says something
Back to pol

61968882
>>61968491
> 200$
> sending millions of barrels to china daily
inbred retards

61968963
>>61968882
Just because massive volume is going to China right now doesn't mean they're going to sell it short. It means they have a deal for cheap oil going forward as oil price hikes

61968974
>>61968963
>going to China right now doesn't mean they're going to sell it short
that's not how oil market works ahmed

61969015
>>61968491
Russia has oil.
China is not hostile so it has oil.
America has oil.
Meanwhile in Europe....

61969154
>>61968974
What? You thought BRICS niggers will have to deal in the reality of $200 oil?

61969165
>>61969015
Europe is cooked. Civilization on its way out.

61969305
>>61969165
Do you like the aspect of the euro 10 year bond?

61969334
>>61968573
>less
fewer

61973317
What is even the point anons? Inflation is going to eat it away. Income is not going to keep up with inflation.

61973320
>>61969015
>>61969165
In Asia, it's even bleak. Atleast EU has pipelines.

61973322
>>61968491
>oil to $200
Wrong. It’s going to $250

61973324
>>61969015
>America has oil.
Damn, where?

61973327
>>61973317
Without struggling we will be even worse

61973333
>>61973324
US is the largest oil producer in the world.

61973357
>>61973327
I thought I struggled enough and I thought I'd lead a comfy life going forward. But the forecast doesn't look too bright. I do agree with you, I wanted my son to have some amount of struggle like me.

61973448
Why did you decide to beome a GME baggie?

61973468
>>61968620
yeah oil prices don't have shit to do with businesses.

61973475
>>61968519
Based Robinhood saving retards from themselves

61973478
who's speaking for iran, lol
some dude who got the access to its media account

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 99 replies — 98.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-12 12:50 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968601
>>61968340
they get equity in link token

61968616
>>61964682
how the fuck does swift even make money it feels like the biggest vaporwave company to ever exist..a big paper tiger.

61968817
>>61964199

saw some homeless guy ranting about this yesterday
he was crawling down the sidewalk trying to pickup food for his cult master, but wasn't making much progress, as he was using up all his energy yelling about these "partnerships"

i guess that goes to show you kids....cuckoldry does NOT pay


THE Cuckolds of crypto

61968828
>>61965559
>Swift going live.

wait i thought it went "live" in november of last year?

>>61965423
and worst of all, even in 10 years, none of that shit involves link funding token. it will be gone by then, mark my words

61968875
>>61964278
>look at all the XRP retards in the comments


here's the exact part on the chart where link boyscouts finally broke and went full psycho against xrp

this was the summer of last year ('25) when xrp ran up to mid $3's while link barely budged


you see, link, just like its holders, is so weak and limp, that even the entire market pumping can barely move it. it's like trying to drag a 400 pound dead body

it's funny to see a coin price mimic the physicality of its holders. art imitating life if you will

61968895
>>61968358
>CL employees have officially stated that there is no IPO happening

posts like these are great. they truly show how incredibly naive and inexperienced a link boyscout is

>duuuuuuude the janitor at the building i work at said the owner isn't selling

as if any of these conversations would involve a 26 yr old trans "god" who's job it is to copy and paste buzzwords on x

61968914
>>61968875
didnt read your slop lol Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

61968946
>>61968616
>how the fuck does swift even make money

swift's purpose is not to make money. it's a co-op

they do collect some annual fees from the member banks to facilitate operations. they are not aiming to generate a profit, and they aren't taking a cut of cross border transactions if that's what you're thinking


not for nothing bro but you could've had answer to your q in like 15 seconds w ai search

61968951
>>61968914
>Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

the funny part is you are the exact same as them

in your head your ego is telling you that you're a secret genius while the xrp cult just doesn't "get it". but the reality is they just went 7x last year while you made nothing

your ego is saving you from the brutal reality

61969258
>>61968951
so which one are you

61969267
>literal retard brown mentally ill gooners are making more money than you
feels bad man
but pain is temporary, glory is eternal! WAGMI MARINES

61969348
>>61964199
It's amazing the lack of interest in LINK. It's get the best news and doesn't move at all. In 2019 this news would have pumped it to $100.

61969656
>>61968951
>the funny part is you are the exact same as them

Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story. Token price doesnt matter here. Youre hung up on it only because it’s the only way you can downplay the fact that Chainlink got mentioned while XRP didnt lol. And just because link didn’t pump doesnt change the fact that Swift mentioned Chainlink.

61969683
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
yup

61969746
>>61965107
Take your delusional ramblings back to /pol/ you fuckin freak

61969776
>>61967953
no, it's a guy with severe mental illness who has been posting the same image occasionally in link threads for many years. he's probably been extremely blown the fuck out on whatever else he put his money into and can only get satisfaction by making fun of stinkies, because he didn't buyed when it was below a dollar

61969981
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story.

and? bro you're cheering on an offshore company that you own zero equity in just like a sportsball fan

then you had to project me as some big xrp holder. i fucking wish. i actually bought the line that it was dead and didn't buy any this cycle

they used to say to always inverse biz, i should've listened

61969992
>>61969683
>>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
>yup

you meant to say chainlink labs i believe


this doesn't help the funding token tho kid. you guys keep trying these marketing strategies that haven't worked for 5 years straight.

i take it you've never read what einstein had to say on repeating the same thing over and over

61970155
>>61969981
>and?
I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

61970161
>>61964199
>but chainlink was MENTIONED in the swift files

61970974
>>61965559
I don't understand how this fucking chat works. Someone spoonfeed me

61971436
>>61964199
>Price feeds that do zero for token price
>ONLY 20 YEARS TIL PRELIMINARY PRODUCT ROLLOUT!!!! (no exaggeration exactly what SWIFT said)

61972300
>>61968875
>>61968914
>>61970155
Since the Trump pump.

61972330
Cainlink psychosis episode 5789.
Yeah, if there’s ever another huge crypto hype cycle, then ‘muh Chainlink actually getting mentioned somewhere in something serious’ might trigger a massive hype wave and your coin might go to the moon - and hopefully you’ll cash out fast enough.
But honestly, this is getting very cult-like rn.

61972716
>>61972330
>getting
>rn
How new ARE you

61972800
It's over bros, LINK is not new tech, a hidden gem, or a coming 10-100x. LINK is mainstream and is in Twitter roasties bios. It’s a corporate entity now, so Sergey has to dump another 750k LINK to hire talent managers and diversity officers. LINK hasn’t been the biz token for over 5 years now. Just sell anons... i-i-iit’s over. It was a good ride marines.

61972902
>>61965107
>painting yourself blue
Dont threaten me with a good time
>cannibalism
Pure projection; Canninite-baalism you just tattled on yourself watch out for that bro.

61972933
>>61964199
these faggots have been doing trials for as long as i have been on /biz/ lmao. seriously, like 5 years...what the fuck are they doing?

61972954
>>61972933
DUDE JUST ANOTHER TRIAL I PROMISE THIS YEAR IS THE YEAR!!!!!!!!!!

61973267
Pull out of Chainlink while you can, before society portrays it as a Racist currency.

item.title: Nobody is a NEET because they cannot get a job. — 23 replies — 90.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody is a NEET because they cannot get a job.

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-03-12 13:35 UTC

OP

Nobody is a NEET because they cannot get a job. NEET's are just people who are too lazy to work. Isn't it convenient that every NEET somehow also has parents who will let them live in the basement and give them tugboat? Anyone can easily get a job in a warehouse, delivering pizzas, moving furniture, etc. You can get your CDL in 3 weeks and then instantly get a job that pays at least $30/hr. People who are legitimately poor and don't have rich parents to buy them hotpockets will just do one of those things. Only failsons and girlfailures of middle or upper class people become NEETs

Early replies (first 3)

61970791
Thats interesting but did you think about the reason for that so called "lazyness" chud or did you disregard psychology in best chud manier?

61970817
>>61970777
Yeah no shit, you can't be NEET if you're broke. NEET is just a dirty way to say "retired"

61971064
>>61970777
It's called feminism. Instead of men working and women staying at home, 50% of men and women work and the other 50% stay at home. Society hasn't fallen apart yet so it seems to be working.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61971088
>>61970817
So the people on this website are high school and graduate retirees?

61971118
It's just the 202X version of rich kids with absent parents yup. They just let them stay home and game all day paying for everything. Slightly more accessible to your average middle class potential NEET than the doing coke and fucking off at your nepo job 90's rich kid lifestyle, not that those don't exist anymore either.

61971141
>>61971088
I retired at 32 after working for 14 years. If I can afford it, why shouldn't I? I'm not working into my grave, fuck that. Let the goyim deal in the real world

61971189
>>61970777
Undeserved holy trips
There are people with advanced degrees who are getting passed over for the most demeaning jobs imaginable

61971200
>>61971064
> 50% of men and women work and the other 50% stay at home.
This actually sounds good to me. What is the problem?

61971207
>>61971118
Neets today are the real chads.

61971216
>>61970817
> NEET is just a dirty way to say "retired"
Pretty much this. Retirement is for any age.

61971778
>>61970777
It's impossible to get a job if you don't have a hs diploma

61971789
>>61971778
Get a fucking HS diploma then you loser?
Literally who the fuck doesn't have a HS diploma like what

61971821
>>61970777
Not guilting me into being Shekelburgs’ Slave, Bootlicker.

61971876
Over the past two years, I sent literal thousands of job applications. Resume tailored to the posting, custom cover letters, changed tactics periodically, optimized resume, unskilled in various ways, even tried cold calling places nearby. Nothing. Literally fucking nothing. Even unskilled retail / fast food jobs don’t want me, because they’re usually staffed by cliques of mexicans who all speak spanish and hire their own.

This job market is hot garbage and I don’t blame anyone if they can’t find a job right now. This whole idea that you’re “lazy” because you’re not “contributing to society” is blatantly wrong. It’s society that is not placing people who are willing to work into jobs. The mechanism for that is completely broken by who the fuck knows what.

61971881
>>61971876
>unskilled in various ways
*upskilled

61971897
This is true to some extent I think. Many years ago when I was one, my gaming PC broke and parents in that moment just didn't have the spare money to fix it/get a new one, yet upon learning that I suddenly had motivation to earn

61971957
Look, another mad NPC thread. Why are you so mad that someone wants to live their life outside of the preprogrammed rails and limits of your imagination? You're a robot. Also jobs aren't plentiful these days.

61972976
I wish I was rich enough to NEET without issues, I'm worried they'll take my money away soon

61973197
>>61971778
Mate, I’ve worked jobs in Canada and Australia for years without a high school diploma. Though I’m currently getting it online so I can use it to attend uni for citizenship in Argentina.

61973199
>>61970777
I'm a NEET because I'm lazy and my parents are rich.

61973403
>>61971876
>The mechanism for that is completely broken by who the fuck knows what.
everyone knows it's women and brown people

61973432
>>61970777
I don't have a high school diploma and I live in southeast asia where a million people want the same job in the warehouse I do. It's over.

61973455
>>61970777
If I lose my job, I'm not going to the warehouse. Sorry, this is just not for me. You can say I am too lazy, but this is more about dignity and not being treated as a slave. If they had good ethics, solid pay, not overworking people to death, I might consider. As it is - no.

item.title: Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse — 20 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-12 13:36 UTC

OP

Its beyond over for USA, the pool is closed and now the global empire will collapse

Early replies (first 3)

61972232
if destroying america is that easy why didn't Iran do this earlier?

61972240
>>61972232
Iran was unironically trying to be the bigger man and not descend into this barbarity, it took blackmailed pedo Trump to reach this point

61972245
>>61972232
because other countries are ruled by adults
your poor third world muttland could learn a thing or two
t. European

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972277
>>61972240
"being the bigger man" would involve negotiating instead of murdering your own population and subjecting them to an extended campaign you can't win

61972278
>>61972230

61972279
>>61972277
>Killing their own people

some countries care about the rule of law

61972284
>>61972279
>simping for shariah law
retarded

61972292
>>61972277
You don't negotiate with terrorists

61972360
>>61972292
Then whys trump talking to them asking them to surrender and shit? Is he stupid?

61972366
>>61972240
This. Precisely this.

61972370
>>61972277
Post your keyboard right now.
>it's the Hebrew/English keyboard

61972372
>>61972360
Trump is the terrorist

61972389
>>61972277
this is a bloodthirsty israeli kike

61972577
>>61972232
if they did it for no reason there would be a coalition of everybody against them. Even China, an apparently Communist state is apprehensive about this.

61973019
>>61972277
>murdering your own population
Source? We have more videos of American cops executing civilians (2) than iranains doing the same (0)

61973029
>>61972577
That's hardly surprising Americans especially their diplomats were shitting themselves when the French revolution kicked off too.

61973034
It would be so funny if China gave Iran long range missiles and Iran bombed Taiwan for them

61973142
>>61972277
>subjecting them to an extended campaign you can't win
day 12 of the 3 day special operation

61973147
>>61973019
Source? Are you a mudslime shit skin? I’ve literally talked to people who live in Iran. Also, Iran shut down their internet so it’s very hard for info to get out. You stupid nigger.

61973461
>>61972230
It might unironically be true.

A hydrocarbon supply shock might create the required political impetus across the world to electrify and reduce dependence on hydrocarbons. Then the US' direct and indirect control over the supermajority of the world's hydrocarbon supply won't matter anymore. If the spice melange becomes obsolete, it weakens the empire.

The 1973 oil crisis led to the Messmer plan, Project Independence and Nixon's 1000-reactor plan. Modern technology means electrification has never been easier, and allows deep electrification to an extent that wasn't possible in the 1970s.

item.title: HOUSING MARKET IS DEFINITELY GOING TO CRASHAAAAAAACK — 3 replies — 6.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOUSING MARKET IS DEFINITELY GOING TO CRASHAAAAAAACK

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-12 13:22 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61973340
>>61973303
Oh? You thought boomers would allow their investment to crash so you could afford to own property? You silly, silly person.

61973370
>>61973303
mortgage rates are going back up as we speak. they're going to continue going up as higher energy prices drive up inflation and force the fed's hand to maintain rates.

61973394
Don't look up at the oil chart in correlation to 2008. Hoomers won't like it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT — 207 replies — 112.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT

Open thread • Replies: 207 • Updated: 2026-03-12 12:00 UTC

OP

GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!!

GOYIM!!!!!

DJT

Early replies (first 3)

61954017
>>61954004
BIDENS OIL

61954029
>>61954004
that kid should have practiced his aim a bit more

61954034
>>61954004
I voted for this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61962279
>>61961113
>I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.
Your tone indicates you believe in the dollar, so no sincerity from you.

61964449
How many of you stupid motherfuckers bought oil? HAHAHAHAHAHHAHA.

61964498
>>61964449
i shorted it

61964509
>>61954140
Isntrael said jump goy jump and we jumped. There was no planing.

61964526
>>61955785
This and also support from brainwashed christcuck boomers. I'm not team remove taco even if he is a jewish puppet

61964533
>>61964526
>not
on

61964536
>>61964526
What the hell? Even the Sons Of Anarchy are evangelicucks?

61964540
>>61961091
How is he wrong?
Fuck pisslam

61964600
>>61954004
americans are the same people who cheered on the invasion of iraq thinking they were getting revenge for 9/11
their demographics and mental/physical health are far worse today than 2 decades ago so i don't understand why so many anons are disappointed at them, as if you hold goycattle to high standards

61964812
>>61954140
The plan is for ISRAEL to dominate the world.
Escalation is necessary and so is mutt blood.

61969335
>>61954140
The thing is, the scenario of Iranians closing down the strait the moment they're backed into a corner has been talked about since forever. Though I suppose after a few major escalations (2020, 12-day war), of which both of them were done under Trump's orders, he thought that Iran wouldn't dare, that they don't have the capability to do such a thing.

61969384
>>61955810
that jak meme is infinitely funnier than your shitty magic the gathering meme

61969494
>>61956133
>Libtards controlled and censored all of social media until Elon bought Twitter.
And now Elon does the same with any opinion that disagrees with him, left or right wing. Just accept that you are a retard.

61971493
>>61954004
Infuriating

61971579
>>61964540
what you're saying is praise judaism

61971592
>>61954140
Iran are not arabs/moors. They have high IQ and know how to deal with the Great Satan with intelligence.
In other words, FAFO

61971605
>>61954039
>>61957437
Umm guys do you know what NATO is? NATO is that thing that forces "eurochads" to join US in every Middle Eastern suicide pact. Did you forget Iraq?

61971620
>>61969335
Iran didn't dare in 2025 but you can only fake peace negotiations while killing everyone doing the negotiations so many times (twice, turns out)

61971631
>>61971605
NATO is totally broken now, burger. And if a european leader even suggested to go die for jews with the US, the ""far"" right would win the elections with a super-majority. They are dumb, but not as dumb as burgers.

61971810
>>61956993
Basically overseas expats should identify as Canadian

61971850
>>61954970
Post image of your keyboard right now.
>It's the Hebrew/English variant

61971852
>>61955310
This.

61971874
>>61955310
Hell is being caught between both parties bullshit

61971906
>>61954970
>geg
Too obvious

61971921
>>61956866
They're just concealing their pedophilia. Dismiss them

61971976
>>61958149
Literally, figuratively, unironically yes, that is precisely what is happening. With Larry Ellison buying ALL (no that is not an exaggeration) of the legacy media (CBS, CNN, HBO, etc.) on behalf of Israel and the massive Israeli disinfo bots on Reddit, here, X, TikTok etc. The absolute lowest common denominator, bottom of the barrel normie legitimately believes "America is winning! War is over1!!!1!!". You have to be, as the YNs say, "Tapped In" in order to know how dire the situation reallly is. The Jewish disinfo bots aren't as bad here on /biz/ as they are on /pol/ and /b/ but they're here. They're the ones spewing bullshit like what you replied to. Luckily the veil keeps lifting as the days go by and the bots can't drown out ALL of the truthful posts from social media, so it becomes quite easy to become "Tapped In.". When the entirety of the media tells you we are winning, but then you go to the gas station for your daily fill-up of your lifted F-350 Super Duty with the double cabin that you bought at 27% APR for 96 months and see the 90 cent overnight price increase, you start to question whether we really are "winning" and that leads you to Google which leads you to the current news of how an American oil tanker was just shot by a missile, very clearly contradicting the "We are winning." narrative. Even the most retarded conservative boomer who bought that truck at those horrible rates can still add 1+1.

61971989
>>61971976
>YNs
what

61972961
>>61954004
Oh look, he saved caps lock for the part where he insults Americans again, instead of just turning it on for the entire post. Thats nice. Fuckin boomers scum.

61973140
>>61971631
Anon, the far right are statistically the biggest Israel glazers on earth.
Just look at Millei, Orban, Fico, MAGA, and the rest of the clowns. """"Conservatives"""" have been insisting that sucking off Bibi is the real trad way for ages and they're still at it.

>>61971989

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 207 replies — 58.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 207 • Updated: 2026-03-12 10:16 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61970160
>>61970145
> You can live under 30 min from Omaha for cheap in 100% white towns.
aka lower class areas.

61970170
>>61970145
The entire discussion was about how people that struggle in the big city should move out the city. Then here you are moving out the city because you cannot afford it. Do people have 0 self awareness?

61970185
>>61967097
> 95/100 times someone who owns a million dollar house is upper class.
Not in big cities or any city that is well known. 1m would be considered ghetto and low class.

61970313
>>61970185
To add to this
A large fraction of homeowners are also self employed business owners

It's really easy to own a half million dollar house and a half million dollar business and be a working class millionaire

61970322
>>61970313
I think most millionaires are working class. 1/10 have 1m. Of that 10%, 2.5% have 1m excluding a home.
So 99% of Americans are working class.

61970369
>>61965964

i speed raced my income from about $80k - $170k in 5 years. never felt so rich. last 5 years i'm barely up $20k. definitely below inflation. but job is comfy lazy wfh - so i stick with it. am i wrong?

61970371
>>61970369
What? up 20k?

61970415
>>61966076
My household income is around 100k and i live in a relatively low cost of living area and i cant afford a house 3 bedroom 2 bathroom 1500+ sqft house. If you cant afford a house you're not middle class and 25k extra sure as shit isnt going to jump you up 2 spots

61970454
>>61970415
So you are saying $60-80k is not middle class.
How come this topic is so polarizing and sparks this much debate? (read this thread)
$150k is the new middle class.

61970484
>>61967122
Just lie on your application i make less than 70k and have 9 credit cards the highest limit is nearly 20k. The issuers have no way to confirm your income so i just put 130k and raise it a bit every year

61970502
>>61970454
To be middle class you need to marry and let your wife have a career

Neither idea is popular here

61970516
>>61970502
Marriage is cucked in 2026.
If you want kids, find a way without marrying.
If you want female companionship, get a hooker for a few hours.

61970523
>>61970502
A girl in a career = girl who went to college and spends 40 hours a week at work. Gross.
Stay at home wife = bitch living for free. No.

61970557
>>61970454
Thats the thing i dont consider myself middle class because i cant afford a house, but if i would just put another 10k over asking on one of the house i put an offer on 5 years ago when house values were still reasonable and interest rates were half current rate i would consider myself middle class. Middle class varies by too many factors to tie to a single number. I would also consider myself middle class if i was a full coiner

61970564
>>61970516
>>61970523
Exactly

Middle class is out of reach for almost everyone your age because you're either unwilling or incapable of doing what needs done to get there.

61970580
>>61970557
> Middle class varies by too many factors to tie to a single number.
LMAO. THIS is why this topic gets so many replies. Middle class implies a lifestyle. Then you find out how much it costs. Simple.

61970586
>>61970564
Shut up.

61970595
>>61970586
Stupid bot programmed to respond to every comment

61970642
>>61965964
The middle class are just rich people with poor financial sense.
They finance like three vehicles, constantly buy new yard toys(mowers, blowers, fourwheelers, etc.) and stay in eternal debt slavery to up the debt slave score.

61970911
>>61967708
at least its 4c content and not reposts from twitter

61971594
>>61965964
Most Americans want to lump themselves in middle class when in reality they are working class people in denial. Marx might've had a lot of retarded ideas but his definitions of class make a lot more sense then vaguely defining lifestyles and their relation to income.

Lumpenproles are nigs, broke NEETS, druggies and other welfare queens, proles are the majority of people who absolutely must labor in order to maintain their living standards long term, petit bourgeoisie have either enough capital that they can live on the profits generated or have a highly valuable skill set that one can largely dictate the course of their labor, but still must ultimately labor, and the bourgeoisie who have fuck you levels of money & power.

61972335
>>61970586
Lmao mad

61972470
Nigger

61972520
>>61970586
KWAB

61972535
>>61971594
> Most Americans want to lump themselves in middle class when in reality they are working class people in denial
Middle class is working class though. The people making 60k only argued that they are middle class. Being working class or not is never mentioned.

61972540
>>61967215
They live low class lives full of comforts. Better than peasants 100s years ago who has to farm and toil.

61972601
>>61971594
>bourgeoisie who have fuck you levels of money & power.

More like lazy parasites who were born into lazy larasitic bloodlines that control the government.

That's the highest level of wealth.
All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
The only way to do that is to become a deranged sex addict. Then money will flow 24/7 and money ideas etc.

>>61972540
true.

61972856
>>61972601
>All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
Kill yourself kike

61972864
>>61972856
>Kill yourself kike
I voted for this

61973005
>>61965995
By that definition I'm upper class. But doesn't feel like it.

item.title: WEAT - the play everyone is missing — 54 replies — 23.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
WEAT - the play everyone is missing

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-03-12 11:33 UTC

OP

This is potentially the most consequential second-order effect from the oil crisis and almost nobody in retail trading is talking about it yet.
Oil and natural gas aren't just fuel — they're the foundational feedstock for nitrogen fertilizer.
The Haber-Bosch process converts natural gas into ammonia, which becomes urea, ammonium nitrate, and other fertilizers.
Roughly 2-3% of global energy consumption goes to fertilizer production alone. When natural gas prices doubled after Russia invaded Ukraine, fertilizer prices tripled and we got a global food price crisis.

Now consider: European natural gas has nearly doubled already in one week. Qatar - one of the world's largest LNG exporters - declared force majeure. 20% of global LNG transits Hormuz. Europe rebuilt its entire energy security strategy around LNG after cutting off Russian gas.

The third-order effect: We're entering spring planting season in the Northern Hemisphere
RIGHT NOW. Farmers make input decisions in March-April. If fertilizer prices spike 50-100% (which is beginning), farmers either plant less, use less fertilizer (lower yields), or absorb costs they can't recover. The food price inflation from this shows up in August-October harvests -
5-6 months from now.

They can release strategic oil reserves. There are no strategic fertilizer reserves. Food prices are about to be fucked, and as you can see from the chart - if you get in early, you can profit. Let retards from Reddit chase oil prices around. Go ahead and wait for them at the finish line.

You’re welcome fuckfaces

Early replies (first 3)

61957829
>>61957787
>This is potentially the most consequential second-orde
stopped reading here. i hate faggots who try to sound smart. judging by your pic, you think wheat is going to pump? youre a fucking retard.

61957846
Ukraine was also a producer of wheat thobeit

61957902
>>61957829
I’m also right. I’m sorry you get all your trading ideas from mouth breathing retards (HURR DURR LETS LONG OIL. HURR DURR LETS BUY HIMS. Wut about muh chainlink!).

Sometimes you might want to try listening to well thought out theories and intelligence for a change. Yes you fucking retard, wheat is going to asplode. But I actually prefer if you stay out; I’d rather someone like you not profit a dime off it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61963105
>>61962954
Ukraine was a direct removal of wheat exports from the market. Prices spiked immediately because traders could quantify exactly how many million tons were gone. This is an input shock, it’s upstream of the wheat itself. The market hasn’t fully priced it because the crop damage hasn’t happened yet, it shows up in September when yields come in lower than expected. That’s the opportunity. By the time it’s obvious to everyone it’ll already be priced in

>>61962454
WEAT holds three CBOT (Chicago Board of Trade) wheat futures contracts spread across different expiration months. Those are Chicago Soft Red Winter wheat contracts, which are US-listed. But here’s the key thing — wheat is a globally fungible commodity. CBOT wheat is the most liquid wheat futures market in the world and its price reflects global supply and demand, not just American conditions.
If India’s crop suffers because three of their urea plants went offline when Qatar LNG stopped flowing, that tightens global wheat supply, which pulls CBOT prices higher because importers compete for available supply from whoever has it. If European farmers under-apply nitrogen because Middle Eastern fertilizer shipments are delayed, that reduces EU production, which means countries that normally buy from Europe bid on US wheat instead, which lifts CBOT.
The global interconnection is actually what makes the thesis so powerful. You’re not betting on one country’s crop having a bad year. You’re betting on a synchronized global fertilizer shock hitting every major growing region simultaneously during the same planting window. India, Brazil, Europe, the US Corn Belt, Southeast Asia — they all depend on fertilizer inputs that transit Hormuz or are produced with gas that transits Hormuz.

61963122
>>61957829
Followed up with some negative parallelism: “it’s not just x, it’s fucken y”, like it was the script to the final season of Stranger Things. In other words, robot hands typed this post

61963256
>>61963105
Dude you are a genius, how much on Weat do I need to make it?

61963375
Why wheat and not corn? Wheat made sense when the 2 day special military option in Ukraine started, as Ukraine is a major wheat producer, but in a nitrogen starved ag business, corn is a better choice. Corn grows faster and demands more nitrogen especially in the short term.

61963392
>>61963375
Good point I’m curious to see the response

61963749
>>61963375
Over a third of the US corn supply is used to produce ethanol for fuel blends too. But if ethanol production doesn't remain profitable... Wat den?

61963858
>>61963749
Why would that happen though? Ethanol is almost all used to cut gasoline and in a world with higher oil prices more ethanol would be used to cut gas in higher ratios (or at least there would be an incentive to so so where it's possible). The amount of ethanol in fuel does have a government mandated floor, though. Ethanol is too important to farmers for any political party or politician to want to fuck with it in a way that hurts them.

61963915
TLDR
Grow your own taters and become indoor chicken farmer

61963960
>>61963095
>But spring top-dress applications of nitrogen are a separate purchase cycle that’s happening right now, and that’s the part getting disrupted
Do they not just produce fertiliser year round despite the fact that it is only purchased/used at specific times of the year?
I don't know anything about the process so maybe I'm way off base, but my assumption would be that whatever equipment is used to produce it is pretty specialised and would be running year round, and producers or wholesalers of fertiliser would just warehouse the production until it was ready to be shipped to farmers.
If the main application is in Spring then shouldn't 90% of the fertiliser needed to meet demand already be produced?

61963967
I already got heemed trying to play what's going on with this shit. Maybe I'll double down

61969403
>>61963967
Just hold like you say for August

61969507
>>61962395
>Age of Empires taught me more about commodity chains than any econ class
bas'd
now,never copy&paste ai slop into your op ever again, and ew're good

61969526
>>61963095
>There is no substitute at scale.
>full stop
>You can’t just ‘switch’
>yields drop. Not to zero, but meaningfully.
> right now, not when the war ends, not when ships start moving again.
>>61963105
>here’s the key thing —
>You’re not betting on x. You’re betting on y
>—

why even post? why areyou wasting everyones time with llm slop. pathetic fucking NIGGER

61969532
>>61963375
Corn is shit nutrition and can be substituted with onions if it rises in price. Wheat is irreplaceable and literally in the Bible

61971229
>>61957787
okay but why wouldnt one play fertilizer companies directly instead of WEAT? their leftover fertilizer stock is probably worth a nice premium

61971244
>>61957787
Not reading all that gay shit,
Which stock, crypto or commodity and am I long or short?

61971528
>>61969526
damn thanks for pointing that out, I almost ordered some wheat. What a gigantic nigger monkey OP is

61971627
>>61971528
My non crypto portfolio is 20% wheat thanks to OP

61971647
>>61971627
want a medal wheatboy?

61971707
>>61971627
Wheat sounds too autistic not to buy after a beautiful OP. Imagine how ass hurt people would be if you said you got rich off wheat. Peak autism Thanks op

61971748
>>61971647
You may address me as Wheatbaron, nowheater
>>61971707
It won't be Generational wealth, but it's definitely an easy 5x.

61971766
MOS and NTR. Nice comfy leaf fertilizer companies. Lil pump already

61971867
>>61971766
My biggest hold for fertilizer is a nice little company called ASIX. Might pick up some MOS though, elbows up

61972000
i bought wheat and natural gas ETFs (the actual commodities not companies)
rate my financial choice

61972100
>>61957787
I'm buying in, good posts.

61972157
>>61971229
Because they're the ones being choked?
Oh but it's cool, the air they're holding in their lungs is at a premium

61972169
>>61957787
Wheat is stupid, the goyim(cattle) will just switch to other feed like corn.

61972429
>/biz/ confidently falls for 2026 LLM slop
impressive. the future is grim

61973035
>>61972157
yes but, if their current stock is enough for the ongoing season you wont see a rise in wheat price?

61973101
>>61972169
Sneed

item.title: Certified Banger Money Farming — 29 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Certified Banger Money Farming

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-12 11:23 UTC

OP

What are some methods, from which you have actually seen returns from, to make money outside of a day job
Side hustles, beer money, whatever you wanna call it, just name some good grinds out there that you could recommend to basically anyone
>Uhhhh just invest or hedge against some shitcoin
Not the point of the thread fuck off!
Mostly online methods preferred but not necessary (Yes I am aware some things take physical effort)
If it can be done both on a phone and PC even better
Personally I have been trying to form my own hustle for a little over a month now and have a subscriber base totaling $100 a month, not bad but nothing major

Early replies (first 3)

61952894
>>61952873
Indoor shrimp farming + Garloid wrangling

61952930
>>61952873
knee pads

61952932
>>61952930

61953415

61955605
>>61952873

61957251

61957258
>>61952873

61957496
>>61957251

61958438

61960733
>>61958438

61963077
>>61952873

61963084
>>61952873
i have a job, some people commit crimes, i think in general the richest people have a job they commit crime at in addition to side-hustle crimes on the side.

61963314
>>61952873
None of these will scam goycattle into making you millions, but here’s what I’ve done over the years:
>selling blood plasma
>reselling sealed trading cards
>working a second job
>scholarshipmaxxing
>setting up your primary job as a side hustle that bills more (I work in the financial sector, so I do personal finance and consulting on the side).

61963500
>>61963314
Plasma is the one I’m looking into most
What’s the time to revenue look like

61963549
>>61963500
If you’re sufficiently hydrated and protein-rich then it will take less than 90 minutes from start to finish, sometimes less. Revenue will differ greatly depending on whatever deals and promotions they have, but if you donate as often as you can (2x/week in the US) then you’re looking at $400-$500 per month. It’s not life changing money, but it’s not a bad return on your time if you need some extra cash.

61963646
>>61963314
Because I live in a communist country (France) you can't sell your plasma but only (((voluntarily))) donate it.
Fun thing is, France has a program to share (give) organs and blood to Israel since they never have enough (as if we had extra body parts laying around).

61967857
>>61952873

61967865

61967888

I don’t think I’ll do that

61970063

Is BTC just a store of value or more?

People say BTC is boring since it’s not pumping. Is this all it’s gonna be or will it evolve further?

61967714

61967717

RIP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967783

61967842

61967907

61968568
>>61967907

61968612

61969957

61972446
>>61967714

61972451

61972466

and fractions of a cent in all other cryptos

61972505
>>61972466
Yeah no it isn't, try 25 cents you retards and the transaction will never go through on bitcoin. Lying pieces of shit can never show a transaction of something just five or ten dollars because you have to pay exorbitant fees to guarantee the transaction even goes through on time.

61972507
>>61964560
I was finally gonna buy some of this bitcoin stuff that my son has been telling me about for years but then I found out that it was created by Jeffery Epstein to fund human trafficking or something.
No thanks.
Anyway my focus is on the conflict in the Middle East now and watching the crude price.
Hopefully Trump and Israel can turn Iran into a big glass bowl.

61972529
>>61968612
>the greatest and best performing asset of all time!
Baby boomers bought 160 acres for $5,000 in the 1970s and later turned that land into gravel pits and made 1000x more than Bitcoin ever did. Literal sand has performed better than BTC but it doesn’t have a chart and it doesn’t capture attention.

61972588
>>61972505
Cope and seethe, you fudding faggot nigger.

61972599
>>61972529
bitcoin did a 700,000x in 17 years, meanwhile you made up grossly exaggerated numbers to try and make a point and you STILL couldn't create a scenario where it performed better than bitcoin, just think about that for a second, your made up fantasy world best case scenario where you find a bajillion acres of land for 2 cents STILL underperforms bitcoin

61972658
>>61972588
Lol exactly, you fucking Ponzi scheme kiketards can never show a real transaction but anyone who has owned bitcoin and tried to send ten dollars and realised that you have to spend a fucking fiver just to get the transaction to go through the network has quickly realised it will never be money. The amount of people who actually buy anything with crypto is tiny, it's either whales or people who bought so long ago that they can afford to lose some money on it.

Literally no one is using bitcoin as money, they're just holding it, shilling it to retards and then cashing out, which is nothing like money where you can make small daily transactions and use it in every day life. That's why no one even talks about spending money through bitcoin, they haven't even fucking tried to, they straight trade it for cash to profit on idiots, they never use it bitcoin to bitcoin because you make even bigger losses trying to gas your way through the network so your transaction fucking goes through. Lol for those who don't know, just buy a tiny bit of bitcoin and test it yourself, see for yourself retards.

61972666
>>61968612
>a github repo run by a couple dudes is the soundest money ever conceived

61972672
>>61972588
Just to add, so this faggot can cry about the truth, try buying some bitcoin and then making a transaction, try to pay the minimum and watch your transaction never go through and just fail. Looool, crypto is money? Then how can you fail a transaction? Just put the fucking gold in someone's hand and watch that transaction work, but bitchcoin? Lmao you can fail a transaction and it never goes through because you didn't pay five to ten percent or more of your transaction to the miners. It's pathetic. That's why these shills don't use it as money but they use it as a way to launder profits from the Ponzi scheme itself straight into dollars. Even bitchcoin owners don't want to keep their crypto, they want to hold until they sell for dollars lmao. Pathetic cult indoctrinated retards.

Crypto really is just an iq test in that they've sold it to idiots under the characteristics of gold and silver, except 'digital'. That's like me selling starving digital niggers some digital nft food, it's not even fucking real and they can't eat it. Hilarious. Literally crypto faggots are pure failures, because even if they make it big on crypto, one winner comes at the expense of thousands of losers, on top of which the win reinforces stupid beliefs that gets these retards to lose their money real quick just like lottery winners with poor spending habits and no monetary education.

61972680
>>61972672
your posts are always stupid

61972845
>>61967842
It’s already possible with Babylon anon. Go dig around yourself.

61972849
>>61967717
So sad

61972928
>>61972680
Awww not one single refutation because you lying little point scheme faggots have never even tried to spend your bitchcoin, you just hold it, in order to cash out when enough dumb fucking retards buy into your crypto ponzi scheme.

61972936
>>61972928
Nah, they probably don't even buy bitcoin, they just have some account with some exchange or hedge fund and simply trust that they are holding bitcoin on their behalf.

61972939
>>61972680
They think long answers are smart .

61972948
>>61972845
Defi is only on Ethereum I guess. Solana and sui are other options but not much liquidity

61972950
>>61964560

61972957
>>61972948

61972973

61973010

61973013

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

item.title: WTF — 76 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-03-12 04:17 UTC

OP

YOU SAID TO BUY OIL YOU SAID IRAN WAS GOING TO CLOSE THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ FUCK ALL OF YOU

Early replies (first 3)

61959820
The usa ran out of weapons lol. the strait is still fucked.

61959822
>>61959817
I didn't say that, you listened to someone else, should have listened to me retard

61959823
No refunds my brown friend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967479
>>61960453
Yeah, but then the choice for Trump is a forever war in Iran or leaving Israel high and dry and then having to hope the Iranians succeed with a decapitation strike on the entire Likud and Mossad at the same time or else whatever blackmail they have on him via Epstein is coming out. So uh I guess enjoy forever war in Iran and look forward to higher oil prices

61967481
>>61967401
>just get the most expensive fleet in the world to constantly go through a 39 km-96 km wide traphole to get droned and missiled to death
Nigga, do you want a modern amerifat version of the battle of the Bismarck Sea?

61967487
I don't get it. Why doesn't USA just tactical nuke the Iranian settlements near the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint?

61967497
Market has been down all fucking day. So much so that most of my stores didn't even want to put in any order or preload. Fucking up my day and pissing off my drivers who then piss me off.

>.t fuel dispatcher

61967498
>>61967487
Because that would release the tactinuke genie (so the ruskies would consider just nuking the ukrainians for example), make the US a pariah state (causing amongst other things a deep global economic depression) and cause a a retarded pursuit of nuclear power around the globe that would most likely result in some utterly disastrous nuclear conflict.

61967503
>>61967497
Tell the stores that /biz/ says oil going to $250

61967510
>>61967497
What, can't price gouge at $85 oil? lol

61967556
>>61967510
Pfff we wholesale ship this shit. It can be $1.50 or $18 we make the same.

61967565
>>61959833
>>61961565
>>61959887
>>61959956
IRGC isn't going to fight unless americans land and americans won't land because we have the fucking sea. IRGC benefits from basically usurping the clerics and taking over the country, with Khamenei Jr. being a puppet.

The guy hasn't even been seen since the 28th so he's probably dead.

61967677
Drain your pool, you have a delivery of crude comming!

61967697
>>61959817
Don't bet against America

61967744
>>61967697
i wont, but ill hope and pray that Persia is the most annoying, costly and drawn out war even if it makes me become poor

61967748
>>61967697
America bets against itself

61968398
>>61959956

61969202
>>61967677
checked, rekd and kekked

61969285
>>61959957

61971799
>>61967697

61972015
>>61959820
Did Jesus run out of angels?

61972026
>>61968398
you sound copeful & deranged

61972239
>>61967039

61972252
>>61967054

>say mission accomplished

61972267
>>61972252

61972312

61972321
>>61972252

61972353
>>61972321

61972364

61972376

61972381

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61971966
>>61971964

61971967
>>61971964

Genuine question.

61972001
>>61971967
>What did he mean by this?


>BlackRock (BLK) Stock Plunges 5% as $26B Private Credit Fund Limits Investor Exits
https://blockonomi.com/blackrock-blk-stock-plunges-5-as-26b-private-credit-fund-limits-investor-exits/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972006
>>61972001

61972009
>>61971967
Make Netflix cast niggers in historically accurate period pieces.

61972012
>>61972006
They aren't letting people withdraw funds from the casino because somewhere their balance and leverages can't cover it.

61972016
>>61971967
DEI and managed decline. All the stuff /pol/ says is happening that isn't happening but it is a good thing if it does.

61972021
>>61971967
Make everybody brown, gay, and retarded, because this is the only jews can dominate

61972023
https://youtu.be/KwwN5kwjAtQ

61972040
>>61972012
What’s that mean for us?

61972045
>>61972040
No refunds

61972051
>>61972040
You'll be bailing them out when they steal your retirement to make the frogs gay and the girl bosses empowered.

61972054
>>61972040
Nothing. The fund in question invests in illiquid assets and has a contractual withdrawal rate limit of 5% per quarter. Some investor tried to withdraw 9%, got told no, and went to the press crying about it and trying to make a stink.

61972057
>>61972001
>25 Billion in garbage credit
>13 Trillion dollar in assets under management

Cry me a river goyim

61972072
>>61972054

61972075
>>61972045

61963866

61964079
>>61964042

61964089
>>61964007
other way around. crying first then rubbing hands

61964097
>>61964042
Bobo opens shorts, shorts cause market to drop, bobo closes shorts, causes market to rise, mumu buys the dip, bobo opens new shorts, rinse and repeat.

61964107
>>61964036
It doesn't affect the US (the only market that matters)

61964124
Demons

61964180
>>61963969

61964186
>>61964180
because it is you stupid shit, yesterday trump literally said it was nearly complete

61964188
>>61964026
>5 years no stop of dumps and crabdumps

We just had an ath in october.

61964212
>>61964186
That's what the orange nigger said, it's obvious everything went out of his control.

61964216
>>61963788
Why would I stop buying? Even if the war goes on for years the market will just keep going up with small dips here and there. I am here to make money long term. Not short term gambler highs.

61964226
>>61964212
>DURR THE WAR ISNT ENDING BECAUSE I SAID SO
actually fucking delusional, I guess the price of oil is still $120 in your mind. the market is already beyond recovering

61964243
Bitcoin was in a bear market prior to any issues with Iran. Even if it is cooling off (its not, iran is bombing at an even higher frequency) everything is even more bearish than it was before it all even started.

61964249
>ultra bad PR when they killed those schoolgirls meaning even less support for the war than usual
>high oil price fucks everyone so they'll just focus on that and liberate the strait
>kikes and their golem both say they already won
>orange nigger doesn't want dow under 50k
It's just up at this point until some new epstein distraction then AI bubble collapse.
Yes I panic sold the first day but luckily bought back cheaper.

61964259
>>61963788

the true bullrun can now resume

61964268
>>61964259

I'm so tired

61964312

61964492

Did you forget we printed like half of all the USD that has ever existed since 2021?
It was an ath in fake, gay, globohomo normie valuation
